/usr/bin/ar qc libEventBus.a CMakeFiles/EventBus.dir/src/dexode/EventBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EventBus.dir/src/dexode/eventbus/perk/PassPerk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EventBus.dir/src/dexode/eventbus/perk/Perk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EventBus.dir/src/dexode/eventbus/perk/PerkEventBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EventBus.dir/src/dexode/eventbus/perk/TagPerk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EventBus.dir/src/dexode/eventbus/perk/WaitPerk.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libEventBus.a
